test.query: SELECT count() FROM (SELECT {string} FROM hits_10m_single LIMIT 3000000) WHERE NOT ignore(base64Encode({string}))
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT {string} FROM hits_10m_single LIMIT 3000000) WHERE base64Decode(base64Encode({string})) != {string}
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT {string} FROM hits_10m_single LIMIT 3000000) WHERE tryBase64Decode(base64Encode({string})) != {string}
